title: Zeebe Process Instance Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for the Zeebe ProcessInstance resource

fields.name: processInstanceKey
fields.description: Unique auto-generated key identifying this process instance

fields.name: processDefinitionKey
fields.description: Key of the deployed process definition being executed

fields.name: bpmnProcessId
fields.description: The BPMN process ID as declared in the process XML (e.g., 'order-process')

fields.name: version
fields.description: Version number of the process definition (defaults to latest)

fields.name: tenantId
fields.description: Tenant ID for multi-tenant Camunda deployments
